strategy --title OpenSpec master roadmap --detail Reconciled openspec, tmp artifacts, and product vision into complete-portfolio-operating-system roadmap for public shell, editorial CMS, runtime CMS, and tooling truth.

strategy --title Homepage section contract --detail Added explicit master-spec rules that every non-hero homepage section must be an independently legible titled module aligned with admin composition and mobile one-swipe scanning.

green --title Homepage module framing --detail Implemented a public section frame in OnePageView so every non-hero homepage block gets a visible title and route label, improving mobile scanability without changing Convex-driven section composition.

validation --title Homepage label alignment --detail Aligned homepage module titles and routes with the same Convex pages catalog used by admin, while preserving section-only modules like colored_works as local homepage constructs.
green Tightened public shell: sticky module headers, compact footer tray, stronger sidebar summary, and denser hero proof stage with limited live surfaces.
validation Validated visual pass with bun run check, bun run build, full-page screenshot tmp/portfolio-home-current.png, and viewport screenshot tmp/portfolio-home-viewport.png.
